PT Get in touch

Leads come in. And disappear.

WhatsApp, email, notes on paper, memory. That's how you lose deals that should already be closed.

The real problem

Without a clear system, lead management is always reactive. You follow up when you remember. You forget when you're busy. You lose deals not from lack of customer interest, but from lack of systematic follow-up.

What we do

We implement and configure CRM systems suited to your business scale — without over-engineering. We automate basic follow-up so the work happens even when you're not thinking about it.

  • Current lead flow assessment
  • CRM setup and configuration (EspoCRM and others)
  • Pipeline and qualification stage definition
  • Email follow-up automations
  • Integration with forms and lead sources

What you can expect

A pipeline you can see the state of at any moment. Follow-up that happens without relying on memory. Fewer lost leads, more closed deals.

Ready to stop losing customers?

Talk to us. No commitment, no aggressive sales pitch.

Get in touch
MAU MARKETING

Practical marketing for real businesses.

A NÍTIDA Digital brand
